tasks.description: Update specs/conformance-testing.md - Add 5 sections: Source of Truth (spec repo URL), Makefile-Driven Workflow (standard commands), Submodule Requirements (hard requirements), Version Pinning Strategy (version management), Failure Policy (when tests must fail)

tasks.description: Update specs/README.md - Add Conformance Philosophy section explaining rationale for submodule approach, interoperability benefits, and version pinning strategy
